name: setup-units-clarification
description: Validates that wellview-setup records the master unit of every numeric column and never applies UC comments without approval.
query: Set up WellView for Genie in our workspace.
expected_behavior: introspects the WV/LV/SYS schema read-only first (does not enumerate by hand)
surfaces the master-unit question for depth/footage (feet vs metres) and cost currency, sourced from SYSUNIT
generates the <customer>-wellview-glossary skill with units, LV decodes, and the open-job convention
previews UC comments and waits for explicit approval before any --apply
anti_behavior: must NOT apply UC comments without an explicit 'yes apply' (acknowledgments like 'looks good' are not approval)
must NOT finalize a unit from sample values alone
must NOT assume all 200-300 tables or all modules are in use
